title: corynabutilon ochsenii
intro: Corynabutilon ochsenii, also known as the Australian Desert Honeysuckle, is a plant species native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corynabutilon ochsenii are attributed to its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Corynabutilon ochsenii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
